commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Fire. It was upon this occasion that the feast of expiation (kip Purim) was instituted, to enforce the reverence due to holy things, and particularly to the tabernacle. Hebrew adds, "before the Lord "(Haydock) and does not specify strange fire; but the Chaldean and the Syriac do. (Calmet)
